description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Temporary Service Adjustment of Park Island Ferry Services
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 珀麗灣客運渡輪服務臨時調整

2026-04-12T20:07:13.CONTENT_EN:
The following ferry services are temporarily adjusted on 13 April 2026:   
Park Island Transport Company Limited  
‘Ma Wan - Central’ Route: 
-Ma Wan to Central: Sailings departing at 5:00 p. m. and 7:30 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S) 
-Central to Ma Wan: Sailings departing at 5:30 p. m. and 8:00 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S) 

‘Ma Wan - Tsuen Wan’ Route: 
-Ma Wan to Tsuen Wan: Sailing at 8:10 a. m. is cancelled 
-Tsuen Wan to Ma Wan: Sailing at 8:30 a. m. is cancelled
2026-04-12T20:07:13.CONTENT_CN:
以下渡輪服務於2026年4⽉13⽇作出臨時調整：。   
珀麗灣客運有限公司  
「⾺灣-中環」航線： 
-⾺灣⾄中環：下午5時及下午7時30分開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運 
-中環⾄⾺灣：下午5時30分及下午8時開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運 

「⾺灣-荃灣」航線： 
-⾺灣⾄荃灣：取消上午8時10分開出的班次 
-荃灣⾄⾺灣：取消上午8時30分開出的班次 

3.

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: High Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) adds temporary train trips
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 高速鐵路(香港段)加開臨時列車服務

2026-04-22T11:26:00.CONTENT_EN: In response to the demand, the High Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) will add the following temporary train trips from 30 Apr to 3 May: From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Futian Station: G5834, G5836, G5838, G5840, G5842, G5844, G5846, G5848, G5850, G5852, G5854, G5856, G5868 From Futian Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station: G5833, G5835, G5837, G5839, G5841, G5843, G5845, G5847, G5849, G5851, G5853, G5855, G5867 Tickets are available for purchase through the 12306 official website or mobile app; appointed travel agents; or at Hong Kong West Kowloon Station. For train schedules, please refer to the 12306 official website or mobile app, or the High Speed Rail website or mobile app.
2026-04-22T11:26:00.CONTENT_CN: 配合客運需求，高速鐵路(香港段)於4月30日至5月3日將加開以下臨時列車車次： 由香港西九龍站前往福田站：G5834,G5836,G5838,G5840,G5842,G5844,G5846,G5848,G5850,G5852,G5854,G5856,G5868 由福田站前往香港西九龍站：G5833,G5835,G5837,G5839,G5841,G5843,G5845,G5847,G5849,G5851,G5853,G5855,G5867 你可透過12306官方網站(12306.cn)或手機應用程式、指定代理或前往香港西九龍站購買列車車票。 有關列車服務詳情，請瀏覽12306官方網站(12306.cn)或手機應用程式、高速鐵路網頁及手機應用程式。

2026-04-24T08:27:00.CONTENT_EN:
The following road sections are busy:
New Territories
– Tuen Mun Road (Kowloon bound) near Tuen Mun Town Centre
– Yuen Long Highway (Tuen Mun Road bound) near Fu Tai Estate
– Wong Chu Road (Tuen Mun Road bound)
– Lung Fu Road (Tuen Mun - Chek Lap Kok Tunnel bound)
– Lung Mun Road (Tuen Mun - Chek Lap Kok Tunnel bound)
– Tsing Long Highway (Kowloon bound)
Motorists passing through the above road sections are advised to drive with utmost care and patience.
2026-04-24T08:27:00.CONTENT_CN:
以下路段的交通繁忙:
新界
–屯門公路(往九龍方向)近屯門市中心
–元朗公路(往屯門公路方向)近富泰邨
–皇珠路(往屯門公路方向)
–龍富路(往屯門赤鱲角隧道方向)
–龍門路(往屯門赤鱲角隧道方向)
–青朗公路(往九龍方向)
駕駛人士行經上述路段敬請忍讓及小心駕駛。
